title: Update AgentRunner base class and CodexAgentRunner to accept config
description: Modify the AgentRunner ABC to accept config and backend as constructor parameters stored as instance attributes. Update CodexAgentRunner.__init__ to replace the codex_bin parameter with config and backend. Update CodexAgentRunner._exec_json() to build the command from self.backend.binary and self.backend.flags instead of hardcoded values. Structural flags (--output-schema, --output-last-message, -C, -) must remain inline. Provide backward compatibility: if config is not passed, call default_config() internally so existing test fixtures that construct runners directly continue to work.
acceptance_criteria: AgentRunner base class stores config and backend as instance attributes
CodexAgentRunner.__init__ accepts config and backend keyword parameters instead of codex_bin
CodexAgentRunner._exec_json() builds cmd from self.backend.binary and self.backend.flags
Hardcoded codex binary name, --skip-git-repo-check, --full-auto, --color never no longer appear in runner.py
CodexAgentRunner() with no arguments falls back to default_config() for backward compatibility
